title: NookOST
description: A reactive music resource pack featuring the hourly soundtrack from Animal Crossing: New Leaf, dynamically played in Minecraft depending on time, location, and events.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723f955644671e5443f1231d45d6bd53d3cfeed9.jpeg)


**NookOST** is a reactive music resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default soundtrack with the iconic hourly music from Animal Crossing: New Leaf.

Using the Reactive Music Mod, the soundtrack dynamically adapts to your gameplay and environment, bringing the cozy atmosphere of Animal Crossing directly into Minecraft.

Music changes automatically depending on:

- Time of day (24 hourly tracks)
- Weather conditions
- Biomes
- Dimensions
- Special gameplay events

The goal of this pack is to recreate the relaxing and immersive feeling of living in a peaceful village, similar to the original Animal Crossing experience.

### 🌿 Dynamic Music System

The music changes based on different situations in the game:

### 🕒 Time of Day

All 24 hourly tracks from Animal Crossing New Leaf are included.

Each hour of the day triggers the corresponding track, just like in the original game.

### 🌍 Locations

Different tracks can play depending on where you are:

- Overworld exploration
- Villages
- Caves
- Structures

### 🔥 Dimensions

Custom music also plays in special dimensions:

- Nether exploration music
- End dimension ambience
- Ender Dragon battle music

### 🎮 Other situations

The pack also includes music for:

- Main menu
- Credits screen



## 📦 Requirements

This resource pack requires:

[Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)

Without the mod, the pack will not work correctly.

## 📥 Installation

1. 1️⃣ Download the Reactive Music Mod
1. 2️⃣ Download NookOST
1. 3️⃣ Drag the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder

```
.minecraft/resourcepacks
```

1. 4️⃣ Launch Minecraft
1. 5️⃣ Open the Reactive Music settings

You can access it by:

Using Mod Menu

Typing the command:


```
/reactivemusic
```


6️⃣ Select NookOST from the available music packs list.

Once enabled, the music will dynamically adapt to your world.


### 🎶 Soundtrack

This pack includes music from:

Animal Crossing: New Leaf
Composed by the Nintendo Sound Team.

The soundtrack is synchronized with:

- 24 hour cycle
- weather
- gameplay situations

to recreate the original relaxing atmosphere of the game.
